file_name: Li et al. - 2025 - A proof-of-concept study for precise mapping of pigmented basal cell carcinoma in asian skin using m.json

did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper used an automated level set image segmentation methodology (a conventional algorithmic method based on the continuous Potts model) to delineate tumor boundaries in Multispectral Optoacoustic Tomography (MSOT) images. While the authors mention future intentions to integrate machine learning classification, the current study's results were obtained using this deterministic segmentation algorithm, not AI/ML/DL.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
